name: Traptrix Genlisea
name_jp: リセの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can Tribute this card; Set 2 "Hole" Normal Traps with different names, 1 from your Deck and 1 from your GY, but banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Traptrix Genlisea" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can Tribute this card; Set 2 "Hole" Normal Traps with different names, 1 from your Deck and 1 from your GY, but banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Traptrix Genlisea" once per turn.
eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can Tribute this card; Set 2 "Hole" Normal Traps with different names, 1 from your Deck and 1 from your GY, but banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Traptrix Genlisea" once per turn.

banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
